IHU Discussion and Evaluation Meeting Participation Form

Dear academicians;

Our 2023 Academic Staff Discussion and Evaluation Camp will be held on 15-17 September on the Island of Democracy and Freedom. Families will not attend the camp and only individual participation of our precious academics is expected.

For camp participation, you must fill out the form below until 5 pm on Tuesday, 5th September.

Although participation in the camp is compulsory, those who will report an excuse can fill in the relevant field on the form.

Sincerely...

Note:

- On Friday 15 September, transfer to the island will be provided by a boat departing from Bakırköy Pier. On Sunday 17 September, the return will be made to the same pier. Our round-trip shuttles depart/arrive from Bakırköy Pier.

Apart from this, for those who want to go to/return from the island by their own means, there is no other means of transport except for Water Taxi.

- Only one person will stay in each room.

- In the hotel, open buffet and coffee breaks in the morning, noon and evening and the use of Turkish bath, sauna and pool will be offered free of charge within the camp. Cafeteria services (except coffee breaks) and other SPA services and minibar use are subject to extra charge.

- General information about the hotel and the facilities offered at the hotel can be found on the it'sinstagram page (https://www.instagram.com/katreislandhotel/) or in the attached brochure.

- For any questions, please contact Uğur Ünlen, our Corporate Communications staff: 0 507 180 77 24

* I give IHU my permission to process, record, preserve, and share the contact information and personal data I provided during the registration process with third parties with whom IHU has a service relationship, as long as those activities are limited to the objectives specified in the clarification text and fall under the purview of Personal Data Protection Law No.6698.

I consent to receiving Commercial Electronic Messages (calls, texts, mail, etc.) from Ibn Haldun University regarding any and all information, surveys, promotions, openings, invites, event reminders, and other forms of communication.

Fields marked with * are required to be filled.
